subcategory: Card component system with header, title, description, content, and footer primitives
use_cases: Display grouped content in contained card containers with consistent styling
Create dashboard widgets and info panels using header, body, and footer structure
Build product listings with title, description, and action areas
Compose blog post previews with image placeholders and text summaries
Structure form feedback messages and confirmation cards
ai_summary: A reusable card component system providing five atomic components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) with standard shadow, border, and rounded styling. Built with React.forwardRef for proper ref forwarding and uses Tailwind CSS utility classes for consistent theming. Forms the foundation for displaying grouped content, dashboard widgets, product cards, and organized information panels across various UI contexts.
